material_or_spec: maple, cherry, walnut, or similar clear hardwood, 0.75 in nominal
notes: Avoid knots and short grain through arms

material_or_spec: spruce, cedar, or birch aircraft ply, 0.125-0.160 in
notes: Prototype thickness to be validated by deflection and tone
Supports soundbox depth if boxed body is selected
Pilot-hole fit and torque must be tested on scrap

material_or_spec: hard maple, bone, or dense hardwood
notes: Round contact points to reduce string breakage

material_or_spec: nylon or fluorocarbon monofilament gauges TBD
notes: Gauge schedule must be calculated and tested

material_or_spec: wood glue suitable for instrument joints
notes: Use fresh adhesive and full clamp coverage

material_or_spec: shellac, oil-varnish, or waterborne clear finish
notes: Do not finish string contact surfaces until fit is final
